stemHtml: The frequencies normally used for voice communications in the Aeronautical Mobile Service are in the…

options.a: VHF band, which includes higher frequencies than the UHF band.
options.b: VHF band, which includes lower frequencies than the SHF band.
options.c: HF band, which includes higher frequencies than the VHF band.
options.d: UHF band, which includes higher frequencies than the SHF band.
